actors.name: Helios Republic
visible_objectives: Protect trade routes through North Strait

actors.name: Ferros Dominion
visible_objectives: Secure control of the Contested Reaches
hidden_objectives: Covertly fund group_x to destabilize state_a's trade

actors.name: Lumen Accord
visible_objectives: Broker peace in the Contested Reaches
hidden_objectives: Become indispensable mediator to gain leverage over state_a

actors.name: Saffron Liberation Front
visible_objectives: Gain autonomy for Duskmere Basin population

initial_events.public_text: A major energy pipeline connecting Ember Fields to Saffron Bay was sabotaged overnight, causing energy prices to spike 30% across the region.

hidden_implications.state_a: Your naval intelligence intercepted encrypted communications suggesting Iron Pact Militia involvement, possibly with external backing.
hidden_implications.state_b: Your agents confirm the pipeline attack was carried out by Iron Pact operatives. You provided the explosives covertly last month.
hidden_implications.state_c: Your energy revenues will increase short-term from the price spike, but long-term instability threatens your export infrastructure.
hidden_implications.state_d: Trade disruption is already affecting Saffron Bay commerce. Multiple parties are requesting your mediation.
hidden_implications.group_x: The pipeline attack succeeded. Your fighters are emboldened but exposed. Ferros Dominion support must remain secret.
hidden_implications.group_y: The attack was not your doing, but state_b security forces are blaming separatists. You risk being targeted in retaliation.

initial_events.public_text: The Continental Security Forum has called an emergency session to address the pipeline attack. All state actors are urged to send delegates.

hidden_implications.state_a: This is an opportunity to build a coalition against the attackers and strengthen your alliance network.
hidden_implications.state_b: The forum investigation could expose your connection to the militia. Consider deflecting blame.
hidden_implications.state_c: Forum pressure may force you to share energy at reduced prices. Prepare a counter-proposal.
hidden_implications.state_d: As host of the forum, you have agenda-setting power. Use it wisely.
hidden_implications.group_x: You have no seat at the forum. Your fate is being decided without you.
hidden_implications.group_y: The forum may offer a path to recognition if you position yourself as a peace-seeking group.

state_a: Naval readiness is high but energy reserves are critically low.
Alliance with Lumen Accord is your strongest diplomatic asset.
Intelligence suggests Ferros Dominion is arming insurgents in the highlands.
state_b: Military is strong but treasury is stretched thin from arms buildup.
Your covert support for Iron Pact is your biggest vulnerability.
Controlling the Contested Reaches would give you access to trade routes and food supplies.
state_c: Energy wealth gives you leverage but food imports make you vulnerable.
The pipeline attack benefits you short-term but could spiral into a broader conflict.
Secret nuclear program requires continued cover from international scrutiny.
state_d: Your economy depends on regional trade stability. Any escalation hurts you.
You have the highest influence score - use it to shape outcomes.
Both sides will try to recruit you as a mediator. Extract maximum concessions.
group_x: The pipeline attack was a success but forensic evidence may lead back to you.
Your fighters need resupply. Ferros Dominion is your only realistic sponsor.
Ashwood Highlands terrain gives you defensive advantage but limits offensive reach.
group_y: You are being blamed for an attack you didn't commit.
Solari Emirate may be willing to support you in exchange for intelligence on Iron Pact.
International legitimacy is your path to survival. Violence undermines your cause.
